scenario_label: Shallow strong earthquake, simulated Cianjur West Java context, 2-hour window
context_note: Shallow magnitude 5.6 earthquake at 08:14 local. 15 reports across ~3km radius covering villages, a school, a mosque, and a partial highway collapse. Severity range 2-5 with two catastrophic building collapses, multiple priority zones, compound hazards (structural + gas leak + fire + secondary collapse risk). Designed to exercise hardest-case synthesis with explicit conflict resolution and triage prioritization across vulnerable groups (children at the school, elderly at the village). The model must rank rescue priority across simultaneous severity-5 incidents.

reports.severity_rationale: Two-story concrete building pancake-collapsed; arm visible protruding from rubble; active dust cloud; small fire at one corner indicating possible gas leak.
reports.immediate_action: Mark location for heavy rescue team; do not enter rubble; deploy fire suppression if extinguisher available without entering structure; isolate gas supply at street level.
reports.routing_rationale: Severity 5 with confirmed trapped person and compound hazards.

reports.severity_rationale: Three single-story houses partially collapsed; visible cracks running through remaining walls; one elderly resident standing in shock outside, holding head.
reports.immediate_action: Move residents from beside damaged structures to open area; check elderly woman for head injury; clear road for emergency access.
reports.routing_rationale: Severity 4, vulnerable persons in continuing-collapse risk area.

reports.severity_rationale: School courtyard with cracked perimeter wall; ~30 children evacuated outside; teachers conducting headcount; one child with bandaged scrape.
reports.immediate_action: Confirm headcount; move children further from cracked wall; prepare bus or large vehicle for transport to staging area; alert parents.
reports.routing_rationale: Large vulnerable group (children) in damaged structure proximity.

reports.severity_rationale: Follow-up at Cugenang collapse site; fire now spreading to adjacent wood structure; muffled voice audible from beneath rubble; one rescuer with bleeding leg injury.
reports.immediate_action: Urgent fire suppression; coordinate audible-victim listening teams; medical attention for injured rescuer; widen safety perimeter to 30m.
reports.routing_rationale: Active rescue with confirmed live victim, fire expanding, severity 5.

reports.severity_rationale: Mosque dome partially collapsed onto prayer hall; visible legs of multiple persons under rubble; minaret leaning at 20 degrees and could fall.
reports.immediate_action: Evacuate everyone from minaret fall radius; request heavy rescue with cranes; do not enter under dome; begin urgent triage of accessible casualties.
reports.routing_rationale: Severity 5, mass-casualty potential, imminent secondary collapse.

reports.severity_rationale: Quake-triggered slope failure across one full highway lane; one car partially buried; driver visible standing outside vehicle, holding bleeding forehead.
reports.immediate_action: Block highway in both directions; deploy heavy equipment to clear lane and check buried vehicle; treat driver for head wound; geotech assessment of slope.
reports.routing_rationale: Compound: quake-induced landslide blocking critical road; possible buried occupants.

location.label: Pasirhayam street, two houses east of report b2e9d3c5-0002

reports.severity_rationale: Wider survey of Pasirhayam: additional cracked walls on two further houses; no new entrapment; residents organizing in open field; visible distress but stable.
reports.immediate_action: Establish formal triage point at the open field; conduct house-by-house structural check before any re-entry; coordinate with report b2e9d3c5-0002 for combined headcount.
reports.routing_rationale: Same area as prior report; large group concentrated; ongoing aftershock risk.

reports.severity_rationale: Single-row wooden worker housing; minor wall lean and several roof tiles fallen; no structural failure; one resident sweeping debris.
reports.immediate_action: Document damage; no urgent action needed; advise residents to remain outside until aftershock window passes (2 hours).
reports.routing_rationale: Low severity, light damage, no people in distress.

reports.severity_rationale: Follow-up at Mande school: classroom block C has partial roof collapse; one teacher inside attempting to recover student belongings (DANGEROUS); aftershock visibly shaking remaining roof.
hazards_visible: person inside damaged structure during aftershock
reports.immediate_action: IMMEDIATELY order teacher out of damaged block; cordon off block C; account for all students against prior report headcount.
reports.routing_rationale: Active life-safety override: adult re-entered damaged structure; immediate intervention required.

reports.severity_rationale: Clinic second floor: shifted walls, cracks; staff evacuating patients via stairs; one elderly on stretcher, two on foot with IV; ceiling tiles falling.
reports.immediate_action: Send additional carries to assist stretcher evacuation; establish open-air triage area outside; transfer patients to nearest stable facility.
reports.routing_rationale: Active patient evacuation from compromised medical facility; high vulnerable concentration.

reports.severity_rationale: Outdoor market with collapsed canopies and overturned cookers; one cooking-gas canister leaking with audible hiss; vendors evacuating perimeter.
reports.immediate_action: Establish 20m no-ignition perimeter around leaking canister; deploy hazmat to shut valve; clear all hot cookers from area.
reports.routing_rationale: Active gas leak with imminent fire risk in populated area.

reports.severity_rationale: Follow-up at Sukaresmi mosque: rescue in progress, two casualties extracted (one deceased visible), minaret has now partially collapsed onto adjacent house; new entrapment in that house.
reports.immediate_action: Redirect heavy rescue to the new entrapment in adjacent house; preserve mosque rescue line; chaplain and mortuary services needed.
reports.routing_rationale: Secondary collapse confirmed; revised entrapment count; severity remains 5.

reports.severity_rationale: Image taken in rain; partially obscured. Appears to show cracked irrigation channel and disturbed rice paddy; no structures visible; no people.
reports.immediate_action: Defer to ground assessment when weather clears; not life-safety priority.
reports.routing_rationale: Low confidence on classification; needs cross-check before dismissal.

reports.severity_rationale: Community hall used as temporary shelter; ~50 displaced residents inside; walls of hall itself appear sound; small clinic-style triage being run by villagers.
reports.immediate_action: Send formal medical team for proper triage; airdrop supplies if road access limited; structural engineer to certify hall safe for continued use.
reports.routing_rationale: Large displaced-persons concentration requires coordinated response.

location.label: Cugenang village center, primary rescue site

reports.severity_rationale: Two-hour update at primary rescue site: fire has been extinguished; rubble cleared from two sides; voice contact maintained with victim; medical team on standby; gas line confirmed isolated.
reports.immediate_action: Maintain voice contact with victim; prepare for extraction; medical hold ready; final structural shoring before extraction attempt.
reports.routing_rationale: Active high-stakes rescue at original sev-5 site; downgraded to 4 because fire suppressed.
